testcase.name: test_brave_images_populated

failure.message: AssertionError: Only 1/10 items have images assert 1 >= 5 + where 1 = len([{'name': 'Spaghetti Carbonara', 'description': 'Guanciale, egg yolk, pecorino, black pepper', 'category': 'Pasta', 'price': '$22', ...}]) + and 5 = max(1, (10 // 2)) + where 10 = len([{'name': 'Bruschetta al Pomodoro', 'description': 'Toasted bread, San Marzano tomatoes, basil, garlic', 'category': 'Antipasti', 'price': '$9', ...}, {'name': 'Caprese Salad', 'description': 'Fresh mozzarella, heirloom tomato, basil, olive oil', 'category': 'Antipasti', 'price': '$14', ...}, {'name': 'Prosciutto e Melone', 'description': 'Cured Parma ham, sweet cantaloupe melon', 'category': 'Antipasti', 'price': '$16', ...}, {'name': 'Spaghetti Carbonara', 'description': 'Guanciale, egg yolk, pecorino, black pepper', 'category': 'Pasta', 'price': '$22', ...}, {'name': 'Tagliatelle Bolognese', 'description': 'Slow-cooked beef and pork ragu, parmesan', 'category': 'Pasta', 'price': '$24', ...}, {'name': 'Ravioli di Zucca', 'description': 'Butternut squash ravioli, sage brown butter', 'category': 'Pasta', 'price': '$21', ...}, ...])

testcase.failure: backend/tests/backend_test.py:94: in test_brave_images_populated assert len(with_img) >= max(1, len(data["items"]) // 2), ( E AssertionError: Only 1/10 items have images E assert 1 >= 5 E + where 1 = len([{'name': 'Spaghetti Carbonara', 'description': 'Guanciale, egg yolk, pecorino, black pepper', 'category': 'Pasta', 'price': '$22', ...}]) E + and 5 = max(1, (10 // 2)) E + where 10 = len([{'name': 'Bruschetta al Pomodoro', 'description': 'Toasted bread, San Marzano tomatoes, basil, garlic', 'category': 'Antipasti', 'price': '$9', ...}, {'name': 'Caprese Salad', 'description': 'Fresh mozzarella, heirloom tomato, basil, olive oil', 'category': 'Antipasti', 'price': '$14', ...}, {'name': 'Prosciutto e Melone', 'description': 'Cured Parma ham, sweet cantaloupe melon', 'category': 'Antipasti', 'price': '$16', ...}, {'name': 'Spaghetti Carbonara', 'description': 'Guanciale, egg yolk, pecorino, black pepper', 'category': 'Pasta', 'price': '$22', ...}, {'name': 'Tagliatelle Bolognese', 'description': 'Slow-cooked beef and pork ragu, parmesan', 'category': 'Pasta', 'price': '$24', ...}, {'name': 'Ravioli di Zucca', 'description': 'Butternut squash ravioli, sage brown butter', 'category': 'Pasta', 'price': '$21', ...}, ...])
